g.text: Versatile software developer focused on low-level systems, reverse engineering,
automation, and full-stack web. Expert in memory analysis, Windows internals,
cryptography, and bridging complex backend logic with clean user interfaces.
MCP server · .NET / Il2Cpp reverse engineering · 30+ assembly inspection tools
DLL · SetWindowDisplayAffinity · hide top-level windows from screen capture
Burn styled subtitles permanently into video with precise timing control
Clone PE digital signatures between Windows executables (security research)
Universal social media video downloader · clean UI · high quality output
Customizable creator content hub · links & digital presence for streamers
Full-stack auth · modern frontend & secure Python backend architecture
Open-source code-gen models · local execution loops · optimized AI frameworks
Runtime memory analysis · low-level process instrumentation · RE workflows
Neural voice cloning · stable diffusion · automated AI asset integration
Interface physics · procedural animations · abstract desktop visual styling
